claimText: Studies show that GLP-1 drugs such as Ozempic affect far more than metabolism, influencing inflammation, immunity, and brain function.
postText: Originally developed for diabetes and weight loss, studies show that GLP-1 drugs such as Ozempic affect far more than metabolism, influencing inflammation, immunity, and brain function while revealing new ways to treat seemingly unrelated conditions.
